final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan, with clearly labeled step-by-step panels.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-panel layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4 from top to bottom
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: setting up the docker environment / pulling the hermes image
  Step 2: launching the docker container with hermes
  Step 3: integrating glmcodingplan into the running container
  Step 4: verifying the deployment and connection between hermes and glmcodingplan
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark terminal / IDE-style background with code snippets and command-line visuals in each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a technical, focused atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a dark-mode developer aesthetic — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" prominently on each panel; must include relevant docker and hermes / glmcodingplan command references as illustrative code blocks per step
Constraints: must preserve the 4-step sequential structure; each step panel must be visually distinct and clearly separated; step numbers must be immediately legible
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures the instructional clarity
